title: State Senate recount in Allen County loses an attorney but starts Tuesday
description:
Congressional staffer Darren Vogt is moving forward with a recount in his 14-vote loss to state Sen. Liz Brown, even after his lawyer pulled out of the case.

title: Purdue survey: Farmer sentiment continues decline amid high input costs
description:
Continued concerns over rising input costs led to another decline in farmer sentiment in May, according to the latest Purdue University/CME Group Ag Economy Barometer.

title: Indiana assessed value rises 10% since 2025
description:
Gross assessed values for commercial, industrial and residential properties collectively rose nearly 10% across Indiana from 2025 to 2026 in the latest state data, less than the 19% jump recorded between 2024 and 2025.

description:

title: Comcast plans to split into two public companies by spinning off NBCUniversal and Sky
description:

title: Fort Wayne to benefit from Michelin manufacturing consolidation
description:

title: $1.9B Cummins joint venture facing indefinite pause
description:
A $1.9 billion joint-venture project that Cummins Inc. and three other companies announced three years ago — a battery plant that was to have begun production next year — is now on hold indefinitely.
